_comment: Captured from access360/43250372/dyn/vib/notify/lite on 2026-06-22. Sensor 22255728 (WS300). NESTED under 'Reading'; overall-only (no raw arrays). Carries acceleration scalars (Xrms.. in g) AND velocity scalars (VelXrms.. in in/s = IPS). Note: live shape differs from the flat schema in docs/mqtt-topics.md - it is nested and includes velocity.
